missing_skills: Strong knowledge of C or C++
Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) proficiency demonstrable through dedicated projects/experience
Deep OOP fundamentals focused on core language development rather than scripting
strengths: Demonstrated expertise in modern, scalable cloud infrastructure and DevOps practices (Azure, Docker, Kubernetes).
Strong practical experience with automation and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible).
Solid understanding of networking fundamentals (VPC, Load Balancing, TCP/IP).
Experience completing full-lifecycle projects (CI/CD Pipelines) that require comprehensive troubleshooting.
weaknesses: The resume heavily emphasizes DevOps and Cloud tools, creating a significant gap regarding the core requirement of C/C++ programming fundamentals.
Lacks dedicated examples or sections demonstrating deep theoretical knowledge in Data Structures and Algorithms required for classical Software Engineering interviews.
recommendations: To match this specific JD (which is fundamentally SWE focused), the candidate must immediately overhaul their preparation to focus on mastering DSA using C++ or C.
Include a section or update project descriptions that specifically solve algorithmic problems rather than focusing solely on infrastructure deployment.

When describing existing projects, frame them by emphasizing the coding challenges and logic used (e.g., 'Implemented a custom data structure for resource mapping in the Terraform workflow') instead of just listing tools.
